violations.text: Establishment does not have a variance or process authority verification to process of canned pickles and relish. Variance request must be submitted by the permit holder and approved as specified. no records of process were observed at the time of inspection. Voluntarily disposal observed. Per owner products never distributed to the public. under § 8-103.11 to the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
